chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: at least one order to remain active

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.predicate: has unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order

entities_post_resolution.definition: An order identifier used to reference a specific customer order within the commerce system, including related payments and shipment details.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Credit card payment of €156.48 for Order #12345 | - PayPal payment of €45.00 for Order #12346 | - Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean attribute indicating that a record is active or inactive, representing current eligibility for operations such as placing orders or being offered for sale.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Category entity in the data model representing a product category, identified by a numeric primary key CATEGORY_ID and described by a display name CATEGORY_NAME.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entry on a sales order referencing exactly one product, containing the quantity and unit price (historical), used to calculate the extended amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique identifier (primary key) for an order record in the orders table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header: the header record for each customer sales order, identified by ORDER_ID, containing core order-level information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order. | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details":
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO |
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO |
| QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO |
| LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: OrderLineItem
 | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single product line within a Sales Order, representing one product (and its quantity) linked to exactly one Sales Order and exactly one Product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details":
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO |
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO |
| QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO |
| LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALE

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID is a self-referential foreign key in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the ID of a category's parent in the category hierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The human-readable display name of a product, used in user interfaces and stored in the product name field (e.g., PRODUCT_NAME).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Key Attributes: - Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product master data entity representing the catalog of all sellable products, identified by PRODUCT_ID (primary key) and referenced by order lines via the PRODUCT_ID foreign key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details":
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO |
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO |
| QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO |
| LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: OrderLi

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is the monetary transaction that settles a Sales Order, represented by a payment record linked to the corresponding order and carrying details such as amount, method, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts.

**Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details":
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PAYMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique payment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being paid | NO |
| PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO |
| AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO |
| CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Payment creation timestamp | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: Payment
 | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Payment          → PAYMENT | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order ha

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the unit of physical delivery of goods to a customer, associated with an order and containing tracking, status, and fulfillment details.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- Shipment #S-001 containing 2 items from Warehouse WH-EU-01 | - Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | SHIPMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers.

**Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details":
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| SHIPMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique shipment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being fulfilled | NO |
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES |
| SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES |
| TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIP

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery And Billing Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: A data construct that stores multiple physical addresses associated with an entity (such as a customer), organized by address type (delivery and billing), with one primary address per type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customer Master is the master/reference table of customers, identified by the primary key CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)
 | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | - CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Who Placed Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who has placed one or more orders and is assigned a unique Customer ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO | | Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Key Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login) | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: The user's unique email address that serves as the login credential in the authentication system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For
entities_post_resolution.definition: Geographic region code used to determine tax applicability and calculate tax amounts.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price field representing the price per unit of a product in euros on a sales line item, used to derive the extended amount by multiplying by quantity.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: Code identifying a geographic region used for tax calculations and reporting.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: A monetary reimbursement issued to a customer by a business, typically following a cancelled order or a qualifying product return.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Individual Or Entity
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: At Least One
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active

- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Category

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional segmentation, account creation timestamp, and active status for business identity and basic customer management.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, stock-keeping details, product names, category association, pricing, and availability status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about product categories, including each category's identifier, name, and its parent category for hierarchy.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores the line items for customer orders, including the product, quantity, unit price, and the total line amount for each item in an order.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipments for customer orders, including which order was fulfilled, originating warehouse, shipment timestamp, tracking information, and shipment status.
